description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GcodeAnalyzer that runs on push to specific paths and branches, and on pull requests to specific branches and paths. The workflow checks an actor, verifies a Conan recipe version, and then runs GCodeAnalyzer on the engine in an ubuntu-latest environment. This involves setting up the build environment, checking out GCodeAnalyzer and test models, installing dependencies, building CuraEngine and tests, collecting STL-files, running CuraEngine, and outputting GCode-files. Finally, it runs GCodeAnalyzer on generated GCode files and stores the benchmark result.
